_meta.notes: downloaded_timestamp is the UTC time the blank PDF was fetched in this spike. AcroForm detection via `pdfcpu info` (Form: Yes/No) and `pdfcpu form list`. SHA256 is of the exact bytes downloaded into ./blanks/. URLs are the official/catalogued sources from docs/user-guides/illinois-estate-planning.md.

forms.form: Health Care Power of Attorney (IL Statutory Short Form POA for Health Care)
forms.source_note: CaringInfo IL advance-directive packet — the only fetched source that is AcroForm-fillable. Contains HCPOA (pp.11-16) + Living Will (p.17). Cross-listed in repo user guide as the Living Will source; it ALSO carries the Health Care POA short form. The Governor's Office advdir2025.pdf packet covers the same HCPOA statutory text but is FLAT.
forms.detected_revision: PDF creation date D:20230712 (2023-07-12); producer Adobe PDF Library 23.3.20; author Sharon Stevenson / Acrobat PDFMaker 23 for Word

forms.source_note: NOT downloaded in this spike. Illinois has no single official statutory HIPAA-authorization PDF; HIPAA authorization is federal (45 CFR 164.508) and is typically bundled into the HCPOA agent's medical-records authority (present in the CaringInfo HCPOA text) or issued per-provider. Phase 1 must decide: (a) generate a standalone HIPAA form from a template (flat overlay or generated PDF), or (b) rely on the HCPOA records-access clause. RECOMMEND treating as an app-generated form, not a government blank.

forms.form: Financial / Property Power of Attorney (IL Statutory Short Form POA for Property)
forms.source_note: Official IL Governor's Advisory Council / SOS statutory short form, 755 ILCS 45/ Art. III.
forms.detected_revision: Title 'POA_Property_July2011'; creation date D:20110718 (2011-07-18, July 2011 statutory revision); producer GPL Ghostscript 8.15 / PScript5.dll
forms.acroform_note: FLAT — `pdfcpu info` reports Form: No; `pdfcpu form list` returns 'no form available'. Needs coordinate-overlay fill strategy, NOT field-fill.

forms.source_note: Same CaringInfo packet as HCPOA; Living Will is page 17 and IS AcroForm-fillable (fields: declaration date, day-of, month/year, city/county/state, witnesses). 755 ILCS 35/.
forms.acroform_note: Shares the same AcroForm as the HCPOA entry (one packet, one field set).

forms.source_note: NOT downloaded as a discrete PDF in this spike — the catalogued source is an IL Dept on Aging landing page, not a direct PDF. Mental Health Treatment Preference Declaration Act (755 ILCS 43/). Phase 1 must locate the direct statutory PDF (IDPH / Dept on Aging) before building.

forms.form: Disposition of Remains (Appointment of Agent to Control Disposition of Remains)
forms.source_note: NOT downloaded as a fillable PDF — the catalogued source is the ILGA statute text page (755 ILCS 65/), not a government blank PDF. The statutory form is embedded in the Act text. Phase 1 likely generates this form from the statutory template (no official fillable government PDF identified).

forms.form: Small Estate Affidavit (IL Small Estate Affidavit — SOS/SRS Form 3606)
forms.source_note: Downloaded. Title/Subject confirm 'Small Estate Affidavit - Form 3606', creation date 2026-01-26. NOTE: the catalogued URL lives on the SERS (State Employees' Retirement System) domain but the document content IS the Small Estate Affidavit. Verify this is the canonical statewide small-estate affidavit (755 ILCS 5/25-1, $150K threshold per Aug 2025 amendment) vs. the IllinoisLegalAid easy-form before Phase 1 build.
forms.detected_revision: Title/Subject 'Small Estate Affidavit - Form 3606'; creation date D:20260126 (2026-01-26); producer Adobe PDF Library 17.0
forms.acroform_note: FLAT — Form: No. Needs coordinate-overlay strategy.

forms.source_note: DOWNLOAD BLOCKED. ilsos.gov consistently resets automated connections (HTTP/2 INTERNAL_ERROR / connection hang) across all attempted UA, referer, and HTTP/1.1 variants. SHA256 / AcroForm detection DEFERRED — requires manual browser download. Corroborating web evidence (ilsos forms list) states ilsos PDFs 'are PDFs with fillable fields', suggesting VSD 773 is likely AcroForm-fillable, but this is UNVERIFIED. Form is notarized per repo user guide.
forms.has_acroform: UNVERIFIED (download blocked; likely true per ilsos.gov forms convention)

forms.form: Minnesota Statutory Short Form Power of Attorney
forms.source_note: Official Minnesota Attorney General consumer publication of the Minn. Stat. 523.23 statutory short form. PDF author metadata is 'Attorney General'. Clean consumer form (not a statute-text wrapper) — principal/attorney-in-fact/successor identity rules, opt-in powers checkboxes (A)-(N), expiration date, and a wet-sign/notarize execution block. Coordinate-overlay (flat).
forms.acroform_note: FLAT — Form: No. Coordinate-overlay strategy (matches il_poa_property_2011).

forms.form: Maryland Statutory Form Personal Financial Power of Attorney
forms.source_note: Official General Assembly of Maryland publication of the Md. Code, Est. & Trusts 17-202 statutory form (grants all enumerated powers by statutory text; no per-power checkboxes). KNOWN-COSMETIC: page 1 and the trailing page carry the statute-web publication wrapper ('[Previous][Next]', '17-202.') — part of the authoritative artifact, intentionally left intact. The fillable underscore rules are the real statutory blanks. Maryland publishes no separate clean government blank; peoples-law.org reproduces this same statutory text.
forms.detected_revision: Title 'Article - Estates and Trusts, Section 17-202'; author 'General Assembly of Maryland'; creation date D:20211221 (2021-12-21)

additional_blank_fetched.form: IL Governor's Office Advance Directive packet 2025 (advdir2025.pdf)
additional_blank_fetched.detected_revision: creation D:20250425, modified D:20250703 (2025); producer Adobe Acrobat Pro 22.3; author Bill Coffin
additional_blank_fetched.acroform_note: FLAT — Form: No. This is the official Governor's HCPOA/Living Will packet but it is NOT fillable; the CaringInfo packet is the fillable equivalent. Material: if Phase 1 must use the official Governor's text verbatim, HCPOA becomes a coordinate-overlay job, not a field-fill job.
